title: Isolation and Fixation of Nuclei from the Mouse Brain for Dip-C
steps: Prepare 1.5 M sucrose ( 40 mL ): 20.538 g sucrose Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #84097 (CAS: 57-50-1) (final: 1.5 Molarity (M) , 51.3 Mass / % volume ) 40 mL water Heat and vortex to mix. Filter to sterilize. Store at 4 °C .

Prepare Nuclei Isolation Medium 1 ( 45 mL ; note that Tris is replaced with HEPES): 7.5 mL 1.5 M sucrose (final: 250 millimolar (mM) , 8.56 Mass / % volume ) 562.5 µL KCl (2 M), RNase-free Thermo Fisher Catalog #AM9640G (final: 25 millimolar (mM) ) 450 µL HEPES (1 M) Thermo Fisher Catalog #15630080 (final: 10 millimolar (mM) ) 225 µL 1M MgCl2 Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher Catalog #AM9530G (final: 5 millimolar (mM) ) 36.2625 mL water Vortex to mix. Store at 4 °C .

Chill a KIMBLE 2mL Glass Dounce Tissue Grinder Set Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D8938 (or larger sizes: KIMBLE Dounce tissue grinder set 7 mL complete Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D9063 , KIMBLE Dounce tissue grinder set 15 mL complete Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D9938 , KIMBLE Dounce tissue grinder set 40 mL complete Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D9188 , or KIMBLE Dounce tissue grinder set 100 mL complete Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D0189 ) On ice .
Prepare 1 mM DTT: 1 mL water 1 µL 1M DL-Dithiothreitol solution (DTT) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #646563 (CAS: 3483-12-3) (aliquoted and stored at -20 °C ) Vortex to mix.
Prepare Nuclei Isolation Buffer without Triton ( 6 mL per sample): 6 mL Nuclei Isolation Medium 1 6 µL 1 mM DTT (final: 5 micromolar (µM) ) Vortex to mix. Chill On ice .
Add 2 mL ice-cold Nuclei Isolation Buffer with Triton to the homogenizer.
Dounce the tissue with 5 strokes of the loose pestle (A), and 15 strokes of the tight pestle (B).
Transfer the homogenate to a tube.

Prepare 1% BSA in PBS ( 1.2 mL per sample; recipe below for 10 mL ): 0.1 g Bovine Serum Albumin (BSA) Fraction V—Molecular Biology Grade Gemini Bio-Products Catalog #700-106P 10 mL PBS, pH 7.4 Thermo Fisher Catalog #10010023 Vortex to mix. Rotate until fully dissolved. Chill On ice . Store at -20 °C if needed.
Centrifuge at 100 x g, 4 °C, 8 minutes .
Carefully remove supernatant without disrupting the soft pellet.
Resuspend in 2 mL Nuclei Isolation Buffer without Triton.
Centrifuge at 100 x g, 4 °C, 8 minutes .
Carefully remove supernatant without disrupting the soft pellet.
Resuspend in 2 mL Nuclei Isolation Buffer without Triton.
Filter with Falcon 40 µm Cell Strainer Corning Catalog #352340 or Corning™ Falcon™ Test Tube with 35µm Cell Strainer Snap Cap Corning Catalog #352235 .
To every 1 mL of cells, add 66.7 µL Paraformaldehyde 32% (methanol free) Electron Microscopy Sciences Catalog #15714 (final: 2 Mass Percent ).
Rotate at Room temperature for 00:10:00 .
Add 200 µL 1% BSA in PBS.
Centrifuge at 1000 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .
Remove supernatant.
Count with C-Chip disposable hemacytometer INCYTO Catalog #DHC-N01 , and aliquot to up to 0.5 million cells per tube.
Centrifuge at 1000 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .
Invert to mix.
Resuspend in 1 mL ice-cold 1% BSA in PBS.
Remove supernatant.
Store at -80 °C .

Prepare Nuclei Isolation Buffer with Triton ( 2 mL per sample): 2 mL Nuclei Isolation Buffer without Triton 20 µL Triton X-100, 10% solution Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #93443 (final: 0.1 % (v/v) ) Vortex to mix. Chill On ice .
creator: Longzhi Tan
